title: lucya tuberosa
intro: Lucya tuberosa, also known as the "Marigold of the Gods" or "Saffron Crocus," is a flowering plant with golden-orange petals and a pungent, earthy scent. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of carotenoids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lucya tuberosa include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lucya tuberosa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
